narrative: Before-Takeoff at runway 13 hold-short. Flight controls free + correct. Flight instruments set but altimeter showing 30 ft discrepancy vs field elevation. Trim and flaps set. Fuel quantity uneven; fuel selector LEFT only. Engine run-up at 1800 RPM — mag check showed left mag drop of 220 RPM (exceeds 175 RPM AFM limit) and right mag drop of 80 RPM (split 140 RPM exceeds 50 RPM limit). Transponder set. Red CAS annunciator illuminated on engine page indicating low oil pressure warning. Takeoff briefing omitted by PIC due to time pressure.
